expected: A non-empty SolidWorks AI Studio packaged desktop UI screenshot with real status text.
observed: This is a valid non-empty SolidWorks AI Studio Execution Monitor packaged dark-theme desktop UI. It contains real status content: stdout execution logs showing active SolidWorks connection, part generation/export/review status, a fully populated Generated files panel listing all output artifact paths, bottom execution timeline showing Queued/Running/Done run statuses with timestamps, and top header showing live service statuses.
evidence: Interface is officially branded SolidWorks AI Studio Execution Monitor packaged desktop dark theme UI
stdout panel contains real execution logs: confirmed SolidWorks instance connection, part generation, SLDPRT/STEP export, and review status output
Generated files panel is populated with 3 complete sets of output file paths including CAD files, preview bitmaps, and JSON review reports
Bottom execution monitor section displays valid run ID, timestamps, and Queued / Running / Done status entries
Top status bar shows live service status: API online, SolidWorks ready, MCP stopped
